title: Governor Kotek Releases Clean Tech Manufacturing Task Force Recommendations
content: Governor Tina Kotek, Senator Ron Wyden, and public-private leaders released the Clean Tech Manufacturing Task Force recommendations to boost Oregon's competitiveness in clean energy technology manufacturing. Co-chaired by Kotek, Wyden, and Daimler Truck North America's John Oâ€™Leary, the task force aims to capitalize on federal Inflation Reduction Act opportunities. The recommendations focus on attracting investment, creating clean tech innovation hubs, promoting workforce training, and supporting disadvantaged communities. These efforts seek to position Oregon as a leader in clean energy technology, create jobs, and enhance economic and climate resilience.
author: Vineeth Chellakannu
